name: linear-axi
description: AXI wrapper for the Linear MCP server

scripts.demo: PATH="$PWD/bin:$PATH" vhs docs/demo.tape && magick docs/demo.gif -coalesce -transparent-color '#1e1e2e' -background '#1e1e2e' -alpha background -alpha off -layers Optimize docs/demo.tmp.gif && mv docs/demo.tmp.gif docs/demo.gif
scripts.check: node --check bin/linear-axi && node --check bin/linear-axi.js && node --check src/*.js && node --test
